creator: muir@try.idiom.com
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
	Start up vipw.

	Copy a login line from a sun, or make one without the
	mysterious (I'm ftping manual pages now and haven't see
	'em yet) extra "::0" in the entry.

	write & quit.  You'll get an error like:

		kernel: pid 288: pwd_mkdb: uid 0: exited on signal 11 

	On the console.  

	From this point on, you can't satisfy vipw.
